title: Ran Score: a LLM-based Evaluation Score for Radiology Report Generation
summary: arXiv:2603.22935v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Chest X-ray report generation and automated evaluation are limited by poor recognition of low-prevalence abnormalities and inadequate handling of clinically important language, including negation and ambiguity. title: Founder effects shape the evolutionary dynamics of multimodality in open LLM families
summary: arXiv:2603.22287v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language model (LLM) families are improving rapidly, yet it remains unclear how quickly multimodal capabilities emerge and propagate within open families. title: Latent Semantic Manifolds in Large Language Models
summary: arXiv:2603.22301v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) perform internal computations in continuous vector spaces yet produce discrete tokens -- a fundamental mismatch whose geometric consequences remain poorly understood. title: DAQ: Delta-Aware Quantization for Post-Training LLM Weight Compression
summary: arXiv:2603.22324v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce Delta-Aware Quantization (DAQ), a data-free post-training quantization framework that preserves the knowledge acquired during post-training. title: Designing Agentic AI-Based Screening for Portfolio Investment
summary: arXiv:2603.23300v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce a new agentic artificial intelligence (AI) platform for portfolio management. Our architecture consists of three layers.
